title: 皐月賞の後に・我が刹那にて

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Raaargh!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (I'm giving it my all—right here, right now!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno and Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
At the front—it's Mejiro Ardan! Mejiro Ardan is in
first place!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Aaand first to pass the finish line is Mejiro Ardan!
The daughter of the prestigious Mejiro family has
claimed the first crown in magnificent fashion!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa! That's Mejiro Ramonu's little sister,
right? I guess excellence runs in the family after
all!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
For some reason, I kinda wanna rewatch the race
where Ramonu won her first tiara...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(My heart has never raced so fast before... but it's
different from the jittery feelings I experienced
during my debut race.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(It's as though the fire burning within me has
grown in intensity... It has engulfed my heart!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Argh!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(The sheer drive that emanated from Yaeno and
Chiyono O during the race remains so vivid I can
feel it...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I mustn't be complacent with this victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head out to greet Mejiro Ardan after her
spectacular victory...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I was able to display everything I am in this
moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Although the race is long over, a renewed vigor
still swirls inside me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: It's a very... pleasant feeling.
choice_data_list: This proves how much stronger you've become.
This proves how much stronger you've become.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Trainer. Truly, I could never have
done it without you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I wish to ride the momentum from this victory all
the way to the Aoba Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Until then... I ask that you continue to provide me
with your strict guidance and wholehearted
support.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Determined to help her continue this hot streak, I
refocus on our next goal, the Aoba Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Meanwhile...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I was in perfect form today. There was no way I
could've run any better.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: But Ardan bested me all the same...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Argh!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Things will not play out this way at the Japanese
Derby!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Next time... I will prevail!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: AAARRRGH!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I knew she would be, but... Ardan really is a
fantastic racer.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And I know she'll put on an even better
performance at the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: But still...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...I've made up my mind.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I want to be more like my role model... I want to
catch up to her...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That's why I made a vow... to win the race she
yearns for!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I won't stay defeated. I won't wallow in self-pity!
And I definitely won't stand about crying!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Next time... I'll be the winner!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With each of the three racers harboring their own
aspirations, the Japanese Derby draws ever
closer...
